title: Tao Tao Ehonkan Sekai Doubutsu Banashi
titleRomaji: Tao Tao Ehonkan Sekai Doubutsu Banashi
titleNative: タオタオ絵本館・世界動物ばなし
synonyms: パンダのタオタオ絵本館
Tao Tao - Tiergeschichten aus aller Welt
synopsis: In a valley in China which has never been visited by humans lives a little panda named Tao Tao. Together with his friends Kiki the monkey, Puhu the squirrel and Poe the hare, they play in the forest all day long. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

tags.name: Environmental
tags.description: Concern with the state of the natural world and how humans interact with it.

title: Jagainu-kun
synopsis: Known in Japan as Jagainu-kun, Dogtato is the heartwarming tale of a dog that`s really a potato...or a potato that`s really a dog. Or something. (Jagaimo = potato, inu = dog, thus the name Jagainu/Dogtato.) Dogtato`s world is full of his lovable half-veggie, half-animal friends who are always getting into wacky hijinks and misadventures. (Source: AniDB)

synopsis: In the eight-minute video to celebrate Cinnamoroll's tenth anniversary, the white puppy takes a nap and falls into an abandoned amusement park where he meets the rabbit Chocolat. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: The Diary of a Middle-Aged Sage's Carefree Life in Another World
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako was a player of the VRRPG "Sword and Sorcery" who defeated the Evil God and died for his troubles. When he awoke again he found himself in a strange unknown forest. Furthermore he possessed his avatar's body and abilities. In other words, he was a cheat. Can a 40-year-old virgin live peacefully in this world? (Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

title: The Mirror: Twin Cities - Overture
titleRomaji: Jing: Shuang Cheng - Feng Qi Pian
synopsis: In order to escape the chaotic world, Na Sheng, an enthusiastic and cheerful Hmon girl, journeyed far and long seeking the home of her dreams, Yunhuang. But is Yunhuang really the fabled paradise of Taoyuan? With every step deeper into Yunhuang, scenes of strange and disturbing blood rain unfold; legendary figures with distinctive personalities compete on the stage, performing scenes of poignant and moving tales of myth.

title: Jian Wang 3: Xia Gan Yi Dan Shen Jianxin 2
titleRomaji: Jian Wang 3: Xia Gan Yi Dan Shen Jianxin 2
titleNative: 剑网3·侠肝义胆沈剑心 第二季
synonyms: JX Online 3: The Adventure of Shen Jianxin 2
synopsis: Shen Jianxin, who pulled out the sword of heaven, is full of confidence, and returns to the rivers and lakes when he goes down the mountain. At this time, the Central Plains Wulin is facing an unprecedented crisis. Shen Jianxin was in danger and was ordered to enter the maritime world because of his fetal force and the sword of heaven. He was involved in various plots. During the journey of Shen Jianxin and his party, accidents occurred one after another, and the identity of the mysterious figure was gradually revealed ...

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: Hammerboy
synopsis: The story is about a boy named Mangchi. He is small, but he possesses a magical hammer that helps him get around all his problems.Mangchi lives on a small distant island called Candlestick because everywhere else has turned into a wasteland because of some big catastrophe. When Princess Poplar from the kingdom of Jemius is being pursued by henchmen of the conspirator Moonk, Hammerboy sides with her, ready to unleash all his latent powers in order to save humankind. The movie premiered at the Big Apple Anime Fest on August 30 2003, and went into wide release in South Korea on August 6, 2004. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Greek Roman Sinhwa: Olympus Guardian
synopsis: The animated form of the Korean manwha.

tags.name: Historical
tags.description: Partly or completely set during a real period of world history.

title: Secrets of the Rivers
synopsis: Where the Yellow, Yangtze, and Lancang Rivers begin as one, dwell the three "Water Ghost" clans, the Ding, Jiang, and Yi, along their banks. What are Water Ghosts? Beings who move through water as they please, masters of geomancy and treasure hunting. Yi Sa, the last of her line, runs an "underwater bank" along the Lancang. During a perilous "Golden Soup" dive, she rescues Zong Hang. Seeking truth and a cure for her own fate, Yi Sa trains him as a Water Ghost. Together with Ding Yu Die of the Ding clan, the trio descends into the primordial "Ancestral Golden Soup." (Source: Tencent)

title: Star Fleet
synopsis: In the last years of the third millennium, the solar system is recovering from a devastating interplanetary war. Suddenly, a new enemy arrives in the solar system, intent on destruction and conquest. Against them stands the Earth Defense Force and its top secret X Project. (Source: Anime News Network)
